creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Even though the revision was not increased the current pkg build runs include these ports.

Look for "virtualbox-ose-additions" in the "Queued ports" section:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/build.html?mastername=main-amd64-default&build=pe88d010d0a2b_sb2bd87bb01

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy12/build.html?mastername=140releng-amd64-default&build=e88d010d0a2b

It will take a few days before all pkgs are build and appear on the download servers.
